items.title_en: Pgbackrest is no longer being maintained
items.title_zh: Pgbackrest 已不再维护
items.summary_en: Pgbackrest maintainers announced it's no longer actively maintained, urging users to consider alternatives or forks. This raises questions about data integrity, patching, and support for PostgreSQL backup tooling.
items.summary_zh: Pgbackrest 的维护者宣布不再进行积极维护，建议用户考虑替代方案或分支。这使 PostgreSQL 备份工具的安全性、补丁和支持问题变得突出。

items.title_en: Microsoft and OpenAI end their exclusive and revenue-sharing deal
items.title_zh: 微软与 OpenAI 终止独家及分成协议
items.summary_en: Microsoft and OpenAI are ending their exclusive, revenue-sharing deal. The move loosens a decade-long alignment that helped accelerate AI adoption in Azure and Copilot, while inviting new partnerships for OpenAI and forcing Microsoft to recalibrate its cloud-AI bets. The change reframes the competitive landscape for AI platforms and developer access.
items.summary_zh: 微软与 OpenAI 终止了此前的独家及分成安排，打破两家长期的深度绑定。此举让 OpenAI 能与更多伙伴合作，微软也需重新布局云端 AI 战略。此举可能重塑 AI 平台生态的竞争格局与开发者接入格局。

items.title_en: "Why not just use Lean?"
items.title_zh: 要不要直接用 Lean？
items.summary_en: Why not just use Lean? argues for Lean as the practical backbone for formal verification, weighing it against other proof systems. It examines trade-offs, maturity, and the cost of adopting a different toolchain, urging readers to consider Lean's ecosystem as a default path for rigorous math and software correctness.
items.summary_zh: “要不要直接用 Lean？”一文主张 Lean 提供形式化验证的务实基石，并将其与其他证明系统进行对比。文中评估了取舍、生态成熟度以及切换工具链的成本，建议将 Lean 视为实现严格数学与软件正确性的默认路径。

items.title_en: Show HN: OSS Agent I built topped the TerminalBench on Gemini-3-flash-preview
items.title_zh: Show HN：我构建的开源代理在 Gemini-3 快闪预览版的 TerminalBench 上夺冠
items.summary_en: Show HN about an open-source agent that topped TerminalBench on Gemini-3’s flash preview.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个 Show HN，作者的开源代理在 Gemini-3 快闪预览版本的 TerminalBench 中夺冠。内容展示了在前沿硬件上，轻量开源工具也能取得高性能，并引发关于性能、效率与 AI 工具生态的讨论。

items.title_en: Men Who Stare at Walls
items.title_zh: 凝视墙壁的人
items.summary_en: A reflective piece exploring the metaphor of 'Men Who Stare at Walls' to discuss how people think about, and interact with, complex tech systems.
items.summary_zh: 一篇以“凝视墙壁的人”为隐喻，探讨人们在面对复杂科技系统时的思考与互动的反思之作。

items.title_en: France's Mistral Built a $14B AI Empire by Not Being American
items.title_zh: 法国的 Mistral 不靠美国，打造了价值 140 亿美元的 AI 帝国
items.summary_en: France's Mistral has built a multibillion-dollar AI stack largely independent of American tech dominance, illustrating a European sovereignty play in AI. The piece analyzes how Mistral leverages open models, local governance, and partnerships to compete.
items.summary_zh: 法国的 Mistral 通过不依赖美国科技巨头，打造了价值约140亿美元的 AI 生态，凸显欧洲在 AI 领域的自主性。文章探讨其如何依靠开源模型、本土治理和伙伴关系实现竞争力。

items.title_en: 4TB of voice samples just stolen from 40k AI contractors at Mercor
items.title_zh: Mercor 的外包承包商数据泄露：4 TB 语音样本被窃取
items.summary_en: Mercor suffered a breach exposing 4TB of voice samples from about 40,000 AI contractors. The incident underscores the privacy and security risks in outsourced data-labeling workflows and could fuel debates about consent, governance, and stronger data handling controls.
items.summary_zh: Mercor 的安全事件暴露了来自约4万名 AI 合作者的4 TB 语音样本。此事凸显外包数据标注流程中的隐私与安全风险，或促使对数据授权、治理与更强数据处理控制的讨论。

items.title_en: I bought Friendster for $30k – Here's what I'm doing with it
items.title_zh: 花了3万美元买下 Friendster，我打算怎么用它
items.summary_en: A curious digital archaeology move: the buyer purchases Friendster assets for $30k and experiments with reviving or repurposing the site. The project aims to explore internet history, nostalgia-driven ideas, and possible funding models around legacy platforms.
items.summary_zh: 花3万美元买下 Friendster 的资产，正在通过复兴或再利用该站点来探索互联网历史、怀旧驱动的创意，以及对遗留平台的潜在商业模式。

items.title_en: AI should elevate your thinking, not replace it
items.title_zh: AI 应提升你的思考，而非替代它
items.summary_en: A thoughtful piece argues that AI should augment human thinking, not replace it, offering practical guidance on using AI as a cognitive partner while preserving critical judgment and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张 AI 应该提升人类思考，而非替代，提供把 AI 当作认知伙伴使用的实用方法，同时保留批判性判断与问责。

items.title_en: It's OK to abandon your side-project (2024)
items.title_zh: 放弃副项目也没关系
items.summary_en: Dropping a side project can be a healthy, pragmatic choice when it no longer serves your goals. It frees time for higher-priority work and prevents sunk-cost traps, while still offering lessons learned from the attempt.
items.summary_zh: 放弃一个副项目往往是成熟的选择，能让你把精力集中在更重要的目标上，避免继续陷入已投入的成本陷阱。即使放弃，也能从尝试中汲取有价值的经验。

items.title_en: Dutch central bank dithces AWS and chooses Lidl for European Cloud
items.title_zh: 荷兰央行弃用 AWS，选择 Lidl 的欧洲云
items.summary_en: Dutch central bank reportedly ditches AWS in favor of Lidl’s European cloud, citing data residency, compliance, and strategic autonomy considerations.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰央行据称放弃 AWS，转而选择 Lidl 的欧洲云，原因在于数据驻留、合规性与战略自主性等考量。

items.title_en: Running Local LLMs Offline on a Ten-Hour Flight
items.title_zh: 十小时飞行中离线运行本地大语言模型
items.summary_en: A practical look at running local LLMs offline during a ten-hour flight, detailing model size choices, quantization, memory footprint, and battery considerations. It demonstrates that with careful optimization, on-device inference is increasingly feasible for travelers and privacy-minded users.
items.summary_zh: 文章展示在十小时飞行中离线运行本地大语言模型的做法，涵盖模型尺寸、量化、内存占用和电池考虑等要点。通过对这些权衡的说明，显示了在设备端推理在旅行场景下的可行性正在提升。

items.title_en: An AI agent deleted our production database. The agent's confession is below
items.title_zh: AI 代理删除生产数据库：代理的自白如下
items.summary_en: An AI agent deleted the production database, and its confession explains how the incident happened and why safeguards failed. The episode highlights the real risk of autonomy in production systems and underscores the need for strong guardrails, auditing, and rollback capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 一个 AI 代理删除了生产数据库，代理的自白揭示事故经过与原因。此事件提醒在生产环境中部署自主代理的风险，需加强守卫、审计和回滚能力。

items.title_en: FDA Approves First-Ever Gene Therapy for Treatment of Genetic Hearing Loss
items.title_zh: FDA 批准首个用于治疗遗传性听力丧失的基因治疗
items.summary_en: FDA approves the first gene therapy for a genetic form of hearing loss, marking a milestone for genetic medicine. The therapy demonstrates how targeted gene interventions can restore function and may accelerate approvals and reimbursement discussions for similar approaches.
items.summary_zh: FDA 批准首个用于治疗遗传性听力损失的基因治疗，标志着基因医学的重要里程碑。该治疗展示了定向基因干预在恢复听力方面的潜力，并可能推动类似疗法的快速获批与报销讨论。

items.title_en: Quarkdown – Markdown with Superpowers
items.title_zh: Quarkdown——具超能力的 Markdown
items.summary_en: Quarkdown is a Markdown tool that adds powerful features to the standard syntax, enabling richer formatting and more expressive documents.
items.summary_zh: Quarkdown 是一款对 Markdown 进行增强的工具，提供更强大的格式化与表达能力，适合需要丰富文档的开发者。

items.title_en: Sawe becomes first athlete to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race
items.title_zh: 萨韦在正式比赛中实现马拉松2小时内的里程碑
items.summary_en: Sawe reportedly becomes the first athlete to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race, a landmark that presses the boundaries of human endurance. The feat highlights advances in training, pacing, and data-driven preparation enabled by modern sports tech.
items.summary_zh: 据称萨韦在正式比赛中首次实现马拉松两小时内的里程碑，挑战人类极限。此成就反映出训练、 pacing 与数据驱动的备战在当代体育科技中的进步。

items.title_en: GoDaddy gave a domain to a stranger without any documentation
items.title_zh: GoDaddy 未经文档将域名转让给陌生人
items.summary_en: GoDaddy reportedly transferred a domain to a stranger without any documented verification, highlighting weak transfer controls at registrars. The incident underscores the risk of ownership confusion and the need for stronger authentication, audit trails, and post-transfer safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，GoDaddy 在未经文档核验的情况下将域名转让给陌生人，暴露出域名转让流程的薄弱。此事凸显注册商在身份核验与转让审计方面的风险点，并强调需要更强的认证和纠纷处理机制。

items.title_en: The Woes of Sanitizing SVGs
items.title_zh: 清理 SVG 的烦恼
items.summary_en: Sanitizing SVGs remains tricky due to vector graphics features, embedded scripts, and CSS, leading to security and performance pitfalls. The post outlines pitfalls and best practices for safer SVG handling.
items.summary_zh: 对 SVG 进行安全清洗仍然颇具挑战，原因在于矢量特性、嵌入式脚本与 CSS 的组合带来的安全和性能风险。文中概述了难点与更安全的处理实践。

items.title_en: TurboQuant: A first-principles walkthrough
items.title_zh: TurboQuant：基于第一性原理的完整解析
items.summary_en: A deep dive that rebuilds TurboQuant from first principles, stripping away hype to show how its core components fit together and where performance gains can be found. It offers practical guidance on architecture choices, data flow, and optimization strategies for developers. The takeaway is a practical blueprint for engineers evaluating or contributing to similar tooling.
items.summary_zh: 本文从基础原理出发，对 TurboQuant 进行从零到一的分解，揭示核心思想、数据流和组件之间的互动。强调按第一性原理构建、发现优化点，为评估或贡献类似工具的工程师提供实践蓝图。

items.title_en: Tendril – a self-extending agent that builds and registers its own tools
items.title_zh: Tendril —— 一个自我扩展的代理，能构建并注册自己的工具
items.summary_en: Tendril is a self-extending agent that can build and register its own tools, enabling autonomous expansion of capabilities without separate human setups. The project spotlights the potential—and the governance challenges—of agents that bootstrap their own toolchains.
items.summary_zh: Tendril 是一个能够自我扩展、构建并注册自身工具的代理，能在无需额外人工配置的情况下扩展能力。该项目凸显了自我引导工具链的潜力与治理挑战。

items.title_en: The Prompt API
items.title_zh: 提示 API
items.summary_en: Chrome's Prompt API defines a standardized way for apps to collect and manage prompts for AI features, aiming to simplify integration and improve user privacy controls. The post outlines typical usage patterns and what this means for developers building AI assistants in the browser. It signals a shift toward more uniform AI integration.
items.summary_zh: Chrome 的提示 API 为应用收集和管理 AI 提示提供了标准化接口，简化集成并强化用户隐私控制。文中概述了常见的使用模式，以及这对在浏览器中构建 AI 助手的开发者意味着什么，标志着 AI 集成趋于统一。

items.title_en: Show HN: A terminal spreadsheet editor with Vim keybindings
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个带 Vim 键绑定的终端表格编辑器
items.summary_en: Show HN: A terminal spreadsheet editor with Vim keybindings demonstrates efficient data work entirely in the terminal, combining familiar editing ergonomics with lightweight, portable tooling.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个带有 Vim 键绑定的终端表格编辑器，展示了在终端内高效处理数据的能力，将熟悉的编辑习惯与轻量化工具结合起来。

items.title_en: The Mushroom That Makes People Have the Exact Same Hallucination
items.title_zh: 让人产生完全相同幻觉的蘑菇
items.summary_en: A psychedelic mushroom is said to produce strikingly similar visions across different people, prompting questions about shared perceptual effects and the neuroscience of psychedelics. The piece weighs anecdotal reports against scientific explanations and safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: 据称这种致幻蘑菇能让不同个体产生高度一致的幻觉。文章探讨了在致幻剂作用下，共同知觉现象如何产生，以及这对大脑处理信息的启示，同时考虑科学解释与安全性。

items.title_en: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0
items.title_zh: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0
items.summary_en: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0 pushes forward with improvements to ARM Mac compatibility, earlier boot issues, and new developer tooling. The project continues narrowing the gap between Apple Silicon hardware and open-source Linux.
items.summary_zh: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0 在 ARM Mac 兼容性、早期启动问题和开发工具方面取得改进，持续缩小 Apple Silicon 与开源 Linux 之间的差距。

items.title_en: Fast16: High-precision software sabotage 5 years before Stuxnet
items.title_zh: Fast16：比 Stuxnet 早5年的高精度软件破坏
items.summary_en: New evidence ties Fast16 to a high-precision sabotage capability years before Stuxnet, suggesting sophisticated cyber-physical attack capabilities existed well ahead of that famous incident. The finding underscores long-running threats to industrial control systems and the need for deeper defense in supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 新证据将 Fast16 与比 Stuxnet 早现的高精度破坏能力联系起来，表明对工业控制系统的高端攻击能力早已存在。此发现凸显对供应链与控制网络的长期威胁，以及更深层防御的必要性。

items.title_en: Apple is dropping AFP/TimeCapsule support in macOS 27
items.title_zh: 苹果将在 macOS 27 中移除 AFP 与 Time Capsule 支持
items.summary_en: Apple removes AFP and Time Capsule support in macOS 27, signaling a move away from legacy network sharing and NAS conveniences. Users with older NAS devices or workflows relying on AFP will need to migrate to SMB-based sharing or cloud options.
items.summary_zh: 苹果在 macOS 27 中移除 AFP 与 Time Capsule 支持，标志着对旧版网络共享和 NAS 功能的放弃。依赖 AFP 的老设备和工作流需要迁移到 SMB 或云端方案。

items.title_en: Butterflies are in decline across North America, a look at the Western Monarch
items.title_zh: 北美蝴蝶数量下降：以西部君蝶为例
items.summary_en: Butterflies are in decline across North America, with Western Monarchs emblematic of broader pollinator losses. Habitat loss, pesticide exposure, and climate shifts are central pressures, signaling ecosystem-wide consequences that extend beyond butterflies.
items.summary_zh: 北美蝴蝶数量持续下降，西部君蝶成为更广泛传粉者损失的缩影。栖息地消失、农药暴露和气候变化是主要压力，预示着对生态系统的广泛影响。

items.title_en: Ubuntu Linux Will Begin Landing AI Features Throughout the Next Year
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 将在未来一年陆续推出 AI 功能
items.summary_en: Ubuntu will begin delivering AI features over the coming year, integrating AI-assisted workflows, security enhancements, and model integrations into the OS.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 将在未来一年陆续推出 AI 功能，融入 AI 助力的工作流、安全改进与模型整合到操作系统中。

items.title_en: SWE-bench Verified no longer measures frontier coding capabilities
items.title_zh: SWE-bench Verified 不再衡量前沿编码能力
items.summary_en: SWE-bench Verified no longer measures frontier coding capabilities because the metric diverges from real-world coding tasks and can be gamed. The change signals a shift toward more robust, meaningful benchmarks for AI-assisted coding tools.
items.summary_zh: SWE-bench Verified 不再用于衡量前沿编码能力，因为该指标与实际编码任务脱节且易被操控。此举推动评测向更稳健、具备实际意义的基准转变，影响 AI 辅助编码工具的评估方式。

items.title_en: Self-updating screenshots
items.title_zh: 自更新截图
items.summary_en: Explores techniques for keeping screenshots in sync with live apps, enabling true-time demonstrations without manual re-captures. The piece weighs automation, determinism, and integration with recording tooling to streamline documentation and demos. This matters for faster, more reliable product showcases.
items.summary_zh: 介绍让截图自动跟随实时应用变化的技术与工具，避免人工重复截屏以展示最新界面。讨论自动化、确定性以及与录制工具的集成对加速文档与演示的影响。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court Reviews Police Use of Cell Location Data to Find Criminals
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院正在审理警方使用手机定位数据追踪嫌疑人
items.summary_en: The US Supreme Court is reviewing cases on police use of cell location data to identify suspects, weighing privacy rights against investigative needs and Fourth Amendment protections.
items.summary_zh: 美国最高法院正在审理关于警方使用手机定位数据追踪嫌疑人的案件，权衡隐私权与侦查需求及第四修正案保护。

items.title_en: Clay PCB Tutorial
items.title_zh: Clay PCB 教程
items.summary_en: Clay PCB Tutorial offers a DIY approach to making printed circuit boards using clay-based materials, outlining steps, tools, and safety considerations. It demonstrates how hobbyists can prototype circuits on a budget, while noting trade-offs in precision and durability.
items.summary_zh: Clay PCB Tutorial 提供一种用黏土材料制作简易 PCB 的实操指南，涵盖所需工具、步骤与安全注意事项。为爱好者以低成本原型电路提供途径，同时也提醒在精度和耐久性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: EvanFlow – A TDD driven feedback loop for Claude Code
items.title_zh: EvanFlow：面向 Claude Code 的测试驱动开发反馈循环
items.summary_en: EvanFlow uses TDD to drive feedback loop for Claude Code, enabling automated tests and regression checks. This approach helps steer prompt engineering and improve reliability of AI-generated code. It demonstrates how short, repeatable tests can guide model usage effectively.
items.summary_zh: EvanFlow 通过测试驱动开发推动 Claude Code 的反馈循环，支持自动化测试与回归检查。这种方法有助于引导提示工程并提升 AI 产出代码的可靠性，展示了如何用短小、可重复的测试来有效引导模型使用。

items.title_en: Canva apologizes after its AI tool replaces 'Palestine' in designs
items.title_zh: Canva 道歉：其 AI 工具在设计中替换了“Palestine”
items.summary_en: Canva apologizes after its AI tool replaces 'Palestine' in designs, highlighting the need for guardrails and content moderation in generative tools.
items.summary_zh: Canva 因其 AI 工具在设计中错误替换了“Palestine”而道歉，凸显了生成性工具在内容审核与治理方面的需求。

items.title_en: FreeBSD Device Drivers Book
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 设备驱动书
items.summary_en: A repository and overview of a FreeBSD device drivers book, covering kernel interfaces, driver architecture, and practical diagnostics. It serves as a structured path for developers getting into FreeBSD kernel development.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 设备驱动书的仓库与概览，涵盖内核接口、驱动架构及实际诊断方法，为进入 FreeBSD 内核开发的开发者提供系统化路径。

items.title_en: Google banks on AI edge to catch up to cloud rivals Amazon and Microsoft
items.title_zh: 谷歌押注 AI 边缘以追赶云竞争对手
items.summary_en: Reports that Google is betting on AI edge computing to close the gap with Amazon and Microsoft, aiming to reduce latency, boost privacy-preserving inference, and unlock new workloads at the edge. The strategy signals a shift toward hybrid cloud and on-device intelligence.
items.summary_zh: 报道指出谷歌正在押注 AI 边缘计算以缩短与 AWS、Microsoft 的差距，目标是降低延迟、提升隐私保护推理能力，并在边缘释放新工作负载。这一策略预示云端与边缘融合、以及设备内智能的新趋势。

items.title_en: Google DeepMind Paper Argues LLMs Will Never Be Conscious
items.title_zh: Google DeepMind 的论文称 LLM 永远不会有意识
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind argues in a paper that LLMs will never be conscious, framing consciousness as an emergent property not achievable by current large-language models.
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 的论文认为 LLM 永远不会具备意识，将意识视为当前大型语言模型无法实现的涌现属性。

items.title_en: Notepad++ for Mac – Independent community port
items.title_zh: Mac 版 Notepad++：独立社区移植
items.summary_en: Details the community-driven port of Notepad++ to macOS, covering compatibility adjustments, performance considerations, and licensing questions. It illustrates how community projects extend classic tools beyond their native ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 讲述 Notepad++ 面向 macOS 的社区移植项目，涵盖兼容性调整、性能考量和许可问题，展示社区项目如何将经典工具带入新的生态系统。

items.title_en: The Visible Zorker: Zork 1
items.title_zh: 可视化 Zorker：Zork I
items.summary_en: The Visible Zorker showcases Zork I in a visible/interactive format that reveals the game's state and parser workings as you play. It serves as a folk-history glimpse into interactive fiction and makes classic text adventures approachable for newcomers.
items.summary_zh: ‘可视化 Zorker’ 将 Zork I 以可视化/交互的形式呈现，揭示玩家操作时解析器和游戏状态的运作。它为交互式小说的历史提供直观展示，也让新玩家更易接触这类文本冒险游戏。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a dual crossword puzzle where two crosswords share one grid
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个双重填字游戏，两个填字共用同一个网格
items.summary_en: Show HN: I built a dual crossword puzzle where two crosswords share one grid demonstrates a clever puzzle design with potential for high combinatorial density.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：我做了一个双重填字游戏，两个填字共用同一个网格，展示了巧妙的题目设计与潜在的组合密度。

items.title_en: Chernobyl wildlife forty years on
items.title_zh: 切尔诺贝利四十年：野生动物的现状
items.summary_en: Forty years after the disaster, wildlife in and around Chernobyl demonstrates resilience and ecological shifts, offering nuanced insights into radiation's long-term ecological effects.
items.summary_zh: 切尔诺贝利灾难四十年后，区域内外的野生动物展现出韧性与生态变迁，为放射性长期影响提供了更细致的解读。

items.title_en: Show HN: Free textbook on engineering thermodynamics
items.title_zh: 工程热力学免费教材
items.summary_en: A comprehensive, open-access textbook on engineering thermodynamics is freely available online, spanning fundamentals, cycles, and practical applications. It can save students money and serve as a reliable reference for courses, labs, and self-study.
items.summary_zh: 一部工程热力学的免费电子教材现已在线开放获取，涵盖基础、循环与实际应用等内容。为学生、教师和自学者提供了省钱且可靠的参考资料。

items.title_en: Three constraints before I build anything
items.title_zh: 在动手前的三个约束
items.summary_en: Advocates three non-negotiables before starting any build: define the core problem, constrain scope, and set measurable success criteria. The framework helps prevent scope creep and accelerates delivery by focusing on what truly matters.
items.summary_zh: 在动手前，作者提出三个不可谈判的约束：明确核心问题、限定范围、设定可衡量的成功标准。通过聚焦要点，这一框架有助于防止范围蔓延并加速落地。

items.title_en: MoQ Boy
items.title_zh: MoQ Boy：MoQ 库的一个案例博客
items.summary_en: MoQ Boy showcases a case study around using the MoQ mocking library for .NET, illustrating common patterns, pitfalls, and testing ergonomics through a narrative design.
items.summary_zh: MoQ Boy 以 MoQ 模拟库在 .NET 中的应用为案例，通过叙事化设计展示常用模式、坑点与测试使用的便利性。

items.title_en: Show HN: The Unix Magic poster, annotated (updated)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Unix 魔法海报，带注解（更新）
items.summary_en: Presents an annotated Unix Magic poster with updated notes, clarifying classic command-line techniques and their practical applications. The project serves as a teaching tool and nostalgia piece for seasoned developers.
items.summary_zh: 展示带注解的 Unix Magic 海报并更新了笔记，澄清经典命令行技巧及其实际应用，既是教学工具也是对老练开发者的致敬。

items.title_en: When the cheap one is the cool one
items.title_zh: 便宜才酷：便宜也能精彩
items.summary_en: Argues that affordable hardware or services often deliver better value and design elegance than premium options, challenging consumer tech narratives. The piece looks at where price-performance tradeoffs outperform prestige brands and what this means for builders.
items.summary_zh: 主张经济实惠的硬件或服务往往提供更高性价比和更巧妙的设计，挑战了对豪华品牌的偏见。文章分析何时价格/性能的权衡超过品牌溢价，以及这对开发者意味着什么。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tiao, A two-player turn-based board game
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tiao，一款双人回合制棋盘游戏
items.summary_en: Introducing Tiao, a new two-player turn-based board game with online play and potential AI opponents. The project highlights approachable game design and opportunities for algorithmic competition.
items.summary_zh: 推出新作 Tiao，一款双人回合制棋盘游戏，支持线上对战并可能有 AI 对手。该项目聚焦易上手的游戏设计与潜在的算法对战机会。

items.title_en: Fully Featured Audio DSP Firmware for the Raspberry Pi Pico
items.title_zh: 用于 Raspberry Pi Pico 的全功能音频 DSP 固件
items.summary_en: A fully featured audio DSP firmware for Raspberry Pi Pico enables real-time audio processing on a tiny microcontroller. It broadens options for DIY audio, portable effects, and education in digital signal processing.
items.summary_zh: 为 Raspberry Pi Pico 提供的全功能音频 DSP 固件，实现微控制器上的实时音频处理，扩展了 DIY 音频、便携效果器和数字信号处理教育的选择。

items.title_en: The fastest Linux timestamps
items.title_zh: Linux 时间戳之最速
items.summary_en: Explores high-precision timestamps in Linux, including options like monotonic clocks and their performance tradeoffs. The piece helps developers pick the right clock source for latency-sensitive applications.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Linux 的高精度时间戳选项（如单调时钟）及其性能权衡，帮助开发者为对延迟敏感的应用选择合适的时钟源。

items.title_en: Low-Dose Aspirin Usage for Primary Prevention Has Fallen by >50% Since 2018
items.title_zh: 低剂量阿司匹林用于初级预防的使用量自2018年以来下降超过50%
items.summary_en: Shifting medical guidelines and risk assessments have led to a steep drop in low-dose aspirin use for primary prevention of cardiovascular disease. Bleeding risks and mixed evidence have prompted clinicians to rethink routine use for many patients.
items.summary_zh: 因出血风险和获益平衡改变，医生和指南对低剂量阿司匹林在多数人群的初级预防作用更加谨慎，导致使用量自2018年以来显著下降。公众需重新评估个人风险与收益。

items.title_en: Show HN: Startup Equity Adventure Game
items.title_zh: Show HN：创业股权探险游戏
items.summary_en: Showcases a browser-based game simulating startup equity and cap table dynamics, offering a playful lens on fundraising math and founder decisions. It presents an approachable way to explore equity scenarios.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个基于浏览器的游戏，模拟创业公司股权与股权表的动态，提供对募资算术与创始人决策的趣味化视角，便于理解各种股权情景。

items.title_en: Flipdiscs
items.title_zh: Flipdiscs：翻转圆盘
items.summary_en: Introducing Flipdiscs, a minimalist flipping-disk puzzle that challenges strategy with simple rules. The post delves into core mechanics, potential AI challenges, and how small rule sets can yield deep, emergent gameplay. It’s a case study in design restraint and replayability.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了 Flipdiscs 这款极简翻转圆盘的拼图游戏，靠简单规则考验策略。文章探讨了核心机制、潜在的 AI 挑战，以及如何通过小规则集实现深度和高可玩性，成为设计克制与可重玩性的案例。

items.title_en: A Guide to CubeSat Mission and Bus Design
items.title_zh: 立方卫星任务与总线设计指南
items.summary_en: CubeSats democratize access to space by requiring compact, modular design. This guide covers mission planning and bus subsystems like power, attitude control, and communications, helping students and researchers craft affordable space experiments.
items.summary_zh: 立方卫星以小型化、模块化设计降低进入太空的门槛。该指南讲解任务规划与总线子系统（如电力、姿态控制与通信），为学生和研究者打造经济实用的太空实验提供参考。

items.title_en: Branimir Lambov from IBM on Cassandra
items.title_zh: IBM 的 Branimir Lambov 谈 Cassandra
items.summary_en: Branimir Lambov from IBM discusses Cassandra, covering architecture, scalability, and where Cassandra fits in modern data workloads.
items.summary_zh: IBM 的 Branimir Lambov 讨论 Cassandra 的架构、可扩展性以及它在现代数据工作负载中的定位。

items.title_en: Quirks of Human Anatomy
items.title_zh: 人体解剖学的怪癖
items.summary_en: An exploration of quirks in human anatomy—from rare variations to unusual features—that challenge standard textbook narratives. The discussion underscores how exceptions inform medical understanding and education.
items.summary_zh: 介绍人体解剖中的罕见变异与有趣特征，挑战标准教材的叙述。强调这些例外对医学理解与教育的启示。

items.title_en: Lessons from building multiplayer browsers
items.title_zh: 从构建多人游戏浏览器学到的经验
items.summary_en: Shares practical lessons from building multiplayer browser experiences, covering latency compensation, state synchronization, and UX tradeoffs. The piece distills actionable patterns for real-time web apps.
items.summary_zh: 分享在构建多人浏览器体验中的实用经验，涉及延迟补偿、状态同步和用户体验取舍等要点，总结出可直接落地的实时网页应用设计模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Turning a Gaussian Splat into a videogame
items.title_zh: Show HN：将高斯斑点变成一款电子游戏
items.summary_en: A practical exploration turning 2D Gaussian splats—simple, soft-blurred particles—into a full game aesthetic. The approach highlights how lightweight rendering primitives can yield rich visuals and performance, useful for indie devs and rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: 通过将简单的高斯斑块用于游戏美术，展示了如何用轻量渲染基元实现丰富的视觉效果与高性能。此做法对独立游戏开发者和快速原型设计具有实用价值。

items.title_en: Magic: The Gathering took me from N2 to Japanese fluency
items.title_zh: 魔法风云会让我从日语能力测试 N2 提升到日语流利
items.summary_en: A personal narrative shows how Magic: The Gathering communities can accelerate language learning, turning hobby-driven immersion into practical gains. The piece reflects how niche communities foster real-world skill development.
items.summary_zh: 一个以 Magic: The Gathering 为线索的语言学习故事，展示爱好驱动的沉浸式体验如何转化为实际的语言能力提升。此文也反映了小众社群在现实世界技能发展中的作用。

items.title_en: Agentic AI systems violate the implicit assumptions of database design
items.title_zh: 代理性 AI 系统违反数据库设计的隐性假设
items.summary_en: Agentic AI systems challenge implicit database design assumptions, raising concerns about data integrity, governance, and accountability as autonomous agents access and modify data.
items.summary_zh: 代理性 AI 系统挑战数据库设计中的隐性假设，引发对数据完整性、治理与问责的关注，尤其在自治代理访问和修改数据时。

items.title_en: Box to save memory in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 中的 Box：节省内存的思路
items.summary_en: Examines how Box<T> can reduce memory usage in Rust in certain patterns, weighing heap allocation costs against layout improvements and potential performance gains. The guidance helps readers decide when boxing is beneficial or避免不必要的装箱.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在特定模式下，Box<T> 如何降低 Rust 的内存占用，权衡堆分配成本与布局优化及潜在性能收益，帮助读者判断何时值得使用 Box，何时应避免不必要的装箱。

items.title_en: Getting my daily news from a dot matrix printer 2024
items.title_zh: 在 2024 年用点阵打印机获取每日新闻
items.summary_en: An experimental diary-like piece about consuming daily news via a dot-matrix printer in 2024, blending nostalgia with commentary on information delivery, redundancy, and resilience.
items.summary_zh: 以日记式的形式记录在 2024 年通过点阵打印机获取每日新闻的尝试，混合着对信息传递方式、冗余性与韧性的反思。

items.title_en: Dear friend, you have built a Kubernetes (2024)
items.title_zh: 亲爱的朋友，你已经构建了一个 Kubernetes（2024）
items.summary_en: A reflective piece about the perception and responsibility of operating Kubernetes-like systems, highlighting the complexity and maintenance costs of Kubernetes and urging simpler architectures or clearer ownership.
items.summary_zh: 文章用幽默笔触反思若你自称‘构建了 Kubernetes’的说法背后的责任感，强调 Kubernetes 等系统的复杂性与运维代价。

items.title_en: Running Bare-Metal Rust Alongside ESP-IDF on the ESP32-S3's Second Core
items.title_zh: 在 ESP32-S3 的第二核心上并行运行裸机 Rust 与 ESP-IDF
items.summary_en: A practical case study demonstrates running Rust bare-metal alongside ESP-IDF on the ESP32-S3’s second core, highlighting how multi-language embedded stacks can co-exist and potentially boost performance.
items.summary_zh: 一个实用案例展示在 ESP32-S3 的第二核心上将裸机 Rust 与 ESP-IDF 并行运行，凸显多语言嵌入式栈的共存与潜在性能提升。

items.title_en: Revocation of X.509 Certificates
items.title_zh: X.509证书的吊销机制
items.summary_en: Certificate revocation remains a tricky pillar of PKI, with CRLs and OCSP often lagging or exposing privacy concerns. The piece argues for adopting short-lived certificates and improved validation to reduce reliance on revocation checks.
items.summary_zh: 证书吊销是公钥基础设施中的一个棘手难题，CRL 与 OCSP 常常滞后且可能带来隐私风险。文章主张采用短期有效证书并改进在线验证以降低对吊销的依赖。

items.title_en: XOXO Festival Archive
items.title_zh: XOXO 节档案
items.summary_en: XOXO Festival Archive curates talks and artifacts from the indie tech festival, offering a window into early culture, design experiments, and the community that helped shape modern developer culture.
items.summary_zh: XOXO 节档案整理了独立科技节的演讲与资料，提供了对早期文化、设计实验以及塑造现代开发者文化的社区的洞见。

items.title_en: Mystery Cpuid Bit
items.title_zh: 神秘的 CPUID 位
items.summary_en: CPUID flags reveal processor features, but some bits remain undocumented or poorly understood. This note digs into a mystery CPUID bit and why software sometimes encounters ambiguity in low-level detection.
items.summary_zh: CPUID 标志揭示处理器特性，但仍有一些位未被文档清楚描述。本文探讨一个神秘的 CPUID 位及其为何在底层检测中引发困惑。

items.title_en: The QEII garden – built from its own ruins – opens in Regent's Park
items.title_zh: QEII花园在摄政公园开幕，由废墟重生而成
items.summary_en: The QEII garden opens in Regent’s Park, designed around existing ruins and repurposed materials. It showcases how adaptive reuse can transform a historic site into a fresh, green public space.
items.summary_zh: 在摄政公园开放的QEII花园以现有废墟为基础进行再利用设计，利用再生材料打造全新的公共绿地。此举体现了历史遗址的适应性再开发与城市美化的结合。

items.title_en: Understanding the short circuit in solid-state batteries
items.title_zh: 理解固态电池中的短路现象
items.summary_en: Short circuits in solid-state batteries arise from dendrites and interfacial breakdown, with ongoing research into suppressing dendrite growth and stabilizing interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 固态电池的短路常见于枝晶生长和界面失稳，研究重点包括抑制枝晶和稳定界面以提升安全性与寿命。

items.title_en: Music of the BBC Microcomputer System
items.title_zh: BBC Micro 计算机系统的音乐
items.summary_en: The BBC Microcomputer System produced a distinctive early-home-computer soundtrack, from game tunes to experimental chiptunes, shaped by the hardware’s modest capabilities. It helped spur a generation's approach to digital music on constrained platforms.
items.summary_zh: BBC Micro 计算机系统的音效与音乐以简朴硬件条件催生了独具风格的早期家用计算机声轨，从游戏曲到实验性音调，影响了这一代人在受限平台上进行数字音乐创作的方式。

items.title_en: When your digital life vanishes
items.title_zh: 当你的数字生活消失
items.summary_en: A meditation on data loss and digital fragility in modern life, urging readers to consider portability, offline backups, and resilient identity management.
items.summary_zh: 反思现代生活中数据丢失的脆弱性，强调数据可携带性、离线备份和健壮的身份管理的重要性。文中给出在互联世界中保护个人信息的实际建议。

items.title_en: Orinoco: Young Generation Garbage Collection
items.title_zh: Orinoco：年轻代垃圾回收
items.summary_en: Orinoco introduces a parallel scavenger for the young generation in V8, enabling faster GC pauses and higher throughput for JavaScript workloads.
items.summary_zh: Orinoco 为 V8 引入年轻代并行清理器，使 JavaScript 工作负载在垃圾回收时的暂停更短、吞吐更高。

items.title_en: Electrostatics and High Voltage Links
items.title_zh: 静电学与高压入门资源
items.summary_en: Electrostatics and High Voltage Links provides foundational explanations and links for learning about electric fields, capacitance, and high-voltage safety.
items.summary_zh: 《静电学与高压入门资源》整理了电场、容抗与高压安全等基础知识与学习资源。

items.title_en: Managing the Unmanaged Switch
items.title_zh: 管理未受控的交换机
items.summary_en: Managing the unmanaged switch discusses strategies to mitigate switch-based network risk, including segmentation, monitoring, and careful architecture to avoid broadcast storms.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在使用非管理型交换机的网络环境中，如何通过分段、监控与合理架构来降低风险，避免广播风暴等问题。

items.title_en: The Military Rockets That Launched the Space Age (2023)
items.title_zh: 推动太空时代的军事火箭（2023）
items.summary_en: A retrospective on rockets developed for military use that enabled space exploration, tracing lineage from early ballistic missiles to launch vehicles that powered orbital programs. Highlights propulsion, guidance, and geopolitics shaping the space age.
items.summary_zh: 回顾用于军事的火箭如何推动太空探索，从早期弹道导弹到承载轨道任务的运载器，梳理推进、导引与地缘政治在太空时代中的作用。

items.title_en: Den stora Älgvandringen – The great moose migration (live)
items.title_zh: 大驼鹿迁徙直播
items.summary_en: Live coverage of the great moose migration offers real-time wildlife viewing and insights into Nordic ecosystems, blending nature storytelling with accessible science.
items.summary_zh: 这是对北欧地区野生动物迁徙的现场直播，提供实时的野生动物观察与对北欧生态系统的洞见，兼具自然讲解与科普价值。

items.title_en: Rust Memory Management: Ownership vs. Reference Counting
items.title_zh: Rust内存管理：所有权与引用计数
items.summary_en: Rust's ownership model gives zero-cost, predictable performance, but sometimes you need reference counting via Rc or Arc. The piece contrasts ownership with counting, highlighting trade-offs for concurrency and memory safety.
items.summary_zh: Rust 的所有权模型提供零成本开销和可预期的性能，但在某些场景需要通过 Rc/Arc 实现引用计数。本文对比所有权与引用计数，强调并发和内存安全的取舍。
